landing.tagline: Cut, merge and export your videos to MP4 with no installs and no account required. Done in 2 minutes.
landing.session_warning: If you close this tab you will lose your progress
landing.upload_desc: MP4, MOV or WebM · Drag or click to select
landing.format_warning: You won't be able to change it once inside
landing.step1_desc: 9:16 for TikTok & Reels, 16:9 for YouTube, 1:1 for Instagram. The canvas stays fixed from the start.
landing.step2_desc: Cut with precision, reorder by dragging, add music, text and overlays. All from your browser.
landing.step3_desc: No watermark, no sign-up, no payment. H.264 MP4 compatible with any platform.
landing.why_text: 2minclip is a free online video editor for creating social media content without installing anything. Trim clips, merge videos, add background music, overlay text and images, and export MP4 directly from your browser. No account, no watermark, no limits. Perfect for editing videos for TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts or any platform — from mobile or desktop.
landing.faq_1_a: Yes, completely free. No watermark, no subscription, no export limit.
landing.faq_2_q: Do I need to create an account?
landing.faq_2_a: No. You go straight in and start editing. No sign-up, no email, no password.
landing.faq_3_q: What format does it export to?
landing.faq_3_a: Always MP4 H.264. The universal format compatible with TikTok, Instagram, YouTube and WhatsApp.
landing.faq_4_a: Yes. From any mobile or desktop browser. No app to install.
landing.faq_5_q: What video formats does it accept?
landing.faq_5_a: MP4, MOV and WebM. For audio: MP3, AAC and WAV.
landing.faq_6_q: Is it safe to upload my videos?
landing.faq_6_a: Your videos never leave your device. All processing happens in your own browser using FFmpeg.wasm. Nothing is uploaded to any server.

format_selector.title: Choose format
format_selector.subtitle: Where will you publish the video?
format_selector.warning: You won't be able to change it once inside.

editor.text_edit_hint: tap canvas to edit · double click
editor.back_confirm_body: You will lose all your work. This action cannot be undone.

tutorial.title: How to use 2minclip
tutorial.s1_body: A video editor right in your browser. No install, no account. Everything is processed on your own device.
tutorial.s2_body: Tap '+ Clip' to add MP4, MOV or WebM files. Add music with '+ Audio' and images or overlays with '+ Layer'.
tutorial.s3_body: Use Zoom + / Zoom − or the pinch gesture to adjust the scale. Tap the timeline to move the playhead.
tutorial.s4_body: Tap a clip to select it. Use 'Split' to cut it at the playhead. Drag to reorder. The bottom panel lets you change speed, volume and more.
tutorial.s5_body: Add background music with '+ Audio'. Overlay text with '+ Text' or images with '+ Layer'. Adjust position, duration and opacity in the bottom panel.
tutorial.s6_body: Tap 'Export' when ready. The video is processed on your device and downloaded as MP4. No watermark, no sign-up.

export.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
export.processing_hint:
Processing happens on your device.
May take a few minutes on mobile.
export.done_hint: The download should have started automatically.
export.error_audio: Audio error: try muting clips without audio in the edit panel and export again.
export.error_unknown: Unknown error. Open the browser console (F12) to see the details.

errors.invalid_format: Unsupported format. Use MP4, MOV or WebM for video.
errors.invalid_audio_format: Unsupported audio format. Use MP3, AAC or WAV.
